payload.answer: Update Sam's current employment to Point72 and mark the prior fact that Sam works at Goldman as superseded/former employment.

entity_resolution.reason: The new fact refers to the same person, Sam, as the existing current employment fact.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

details: Detected conflict between existing current employer Goldman and new employer Point72.
Interpreted the new fact as an employment transition because it says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.
Do not present 'Sam works at Goldman' as current after repair.

repair_options: Supersede the existing current fact 'Sam works at Goldman.'
Add current fact 'Sam works at Point72.'
Optionally retain historical fact 'Sam formerly worked at Goldman.'
